evidence: Northern Trust will continue to enable its strategy through significant investments in talent and culture, technology, data, AI and operational excellence.
financial institutions are investing significantly in evaluating new technologies, such as AI, machine learning, blockchain and other distributed ledger technologies
AI Risk Program - a program to identify, assess, and monitor risks from the use of AI, ensuring AI technologies operate safely, responsibly, and within Northern Trust s risk appetite.
Northern Trust uses a variety of machine learning and artificial intelligence (AI) solutions to process transactional activity more efficiently and to mitigate risk.
These uses currently include, among others, digitizing documents, detecting anomalous, fraudulent transactions and training services teams on operational processes.

The framework also applies to artificial intelligence, machine learning, and other advanced analytics models, which are subject to risk-based governance, independent validation, and ongoing monitoring.

AI Risk Program - a program to identify, assess, and monitor risks from the use of AI, ensuring AI technologies operate safely, responsibly, and within Northern Trust s risk appetite.

Northern Trust has certain processes and controls in place designed to mitigate the risks associated with the use of AI solutions, including monitoring the development and applicability of such evolving laws and regulations.

limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 (named programs, no quantified scale).
AI narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed use cases with operational detail, but no quantified business results (e.g., efficiency percentages, cost savings) were disclosed.

Risk disclosure scored 5 due to named governance body (AI Risk Program, ORC), specific risk mechanisms (hallucination, IP/data leakage, regulatory non-compliance), and described mitigation controls, though no quantified risk exposure figures were provided.
